pi_items.source: Task description explicitly instructs creating an employee named 'Maria Anders'.
Task description explicitly instructs setting the payslip date to '2025-01-31'.
Task description explicitly states 'The net pay should be 3,825.00' (4500 - 675 = 3825).
Task description explicitly states 'Income Tax Withholding = 675.00'.
Task description explicitly lists these three modules to be enabled.

privileged_info_summary: The task explicitly requires the agent to set up payroll in Manager.io using synthetic data. The verified requirements are: enabling the 'Employees', 'Payslip Items', and 'Payslips' modules; creating an employee named 'Maria Anders'; and creating a payslip dated '2025-01-31' with a gross salary of 4500.00, a tax deduction of 675.00, and a resulting net pay of 3825.00.
